final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between a set of AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition snippets, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to each other
Subject: must include all 7 concepts as labeled nodes with brief definitions and visual icons:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable infographic layout — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a friendly, easy-to-read direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchy texture feel — exact line weight and paper grain are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept nodes with visible relationship connectors between them; layout must be readable and approachable for a general audience
Avoid:

error: {"source":"provider","message":"Your resource has been temporarily blocked because we detected behavior that may violate our content policy. For more details on Azure OpenAI service content policy, please visit https://aka.ms/aoaicodeofconduct","error_code":"API_CALL_ERROR","provider_error_code":"Forbidden","http_status_code":403,"stage":"submit"}
